'''chathungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabeljouw|kabeljouw]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabeljouw|kabeljouw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chathungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæthingith|chæthingith]] || [[word:chæthingij|chæthingij]] || [[word:chæthingish|chæthingish]] || [[word:chæthingi|chæthingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathuthunguth|chathuthunguth]] || [[word:chathuthunguj|chathuthunguj]] || [[word:chathuthungush|chathuthungush]] || [[word:chathuthungu|chathuthungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathunguth|chathunguth]] || [[word:chathunguj|chathunguj]] || [[word:chathungush|chathungush]] || [[word:chathungu|chathungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathufnguth|chathufnguth]] || [[word:chathufnguj|chathufnguj]] || [[word:chathufngush|chathufngush]] || [[word:chathufnguf|chathufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chathunguthu|chathunguthu]] || [[word:chathunguju|chathunguju]] || [[word:chathungushu|chathungushu]] || [[word:chathunguku|chathunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chathunguth|chathunguth]] || [[word:chathunguj|chathunguj]] || [[word:chathungush|chathungush]] || [[word:chathungu|chathungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chathunguthul|chathunguthul]] || [[word:chathungujul|chathungujul]] || [[word:chathungushul|chathungushul]] || [[word:chathungukul|chathungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chathunguthuthu|chathunguthuthu]] || [[word:chathungujuju|chathungujuju]] || [[word:chathungushushu|chathungushushu]] || [[word:chathunguku|chathunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chathunguthun|chathunguthun]] || [[word:chathungujun|chathungujun]] || [[word:chathungushun|chathungushun]] || [[word:chathungukun|chathungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chathunguthuoro|chathunguthuoro]] || [[word:chathungujuoro|chathungujuoro]] || [[word:chathungushuoro|chathungushuoro]] || [[word:chathungukuoro|chathungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
